instruction: Restore the black underline on the play pause icon below the icon (line from (16,116) to (112,116), stroke #222, stroke-width 2).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/play-pause.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 7.5V18M15 7.5V18M3 16.811V8.69c0-.864.933-1.406 1.683-.977l7.108 4.061a1.125 1.125 0 0 1 0 1.954l-7.108 4.061A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 3 16.811Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/play-pause.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 7.5V18M15 7.5V18M3 16.811V8.69c0-.864.933-1.406 1.683-.977l7.108 4.061a1.125 1.125 0 0 1 0 1.954l-7.108 4.061A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 3 16.811Z"/></g>
  <line id="underline" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x1="16" y1="116" x2="112" y2="116" />
</svg>
